title: origanum majorana
intro: Origanum majorana, also known as sweet marjoram, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Origanum majorana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of sweet marjoram include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe the nervous system and promote relaxation.
